payload.answer: Compiled durable memory decisions for Brain DB, Cognee, and Slack, while preserving Telegram and model choice as open questions.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
Open questions: Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?
payload.decision: commit durable architecture decisions and preserve open questions as non-decision items

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entity identifiers were provided; entities are represented by names only.

relationships.object: source of truth for the personal memory system
relationships.subject: Brain DB

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the personal memory system.
Cognee should be treated as a rebuildable semantic projection, not the source of truth.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent.
It is undecided whether Telegram should be added later as part of the memory system.
It is undecided which model is cheapest while still saturating performance for the memory system.

details: Committed Brain DB as the source of truth.
Committed Cognee as a rebuildable semantic projection.
Committed Slack as a strict memory intake agent.
Preserved Telegram addition as an open question.
Preserved cheapest performant model selection as an open question.
